pr.title: fix(clerk): sync workspace Clerk fixes from yesterday's marathon to GitHub
pr.body:
## Summary
Syncs three files from the Replit workspace where last night's debugging happened. The Replit Agent's auto-commits never made it to GitHub; this PR is a clean cherry-pick of the final state of those three files onto a fresh branch off origin/main.

## Files
- \`artifacts/cos-pwa/src/App.tsx\` — drop \`publishableKeyFromHost\` import, hardcode the TurboBookings dev publishable key
- \`artifacts/api-server/src/app.ts\` — drop \`publishableKeyFromHost\`, use \`process.env.CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY\` directly in \`clerkMiddleware\`
- \`.replit\` line 37 — \`VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY\` updated to TurboBookings key

## Why
Phase 1's auto-provisioned Replit Clerk integration wired \`publishableKeyFromHost(host, key)\` to derive a \`clerk.<replit-host>.replit.app\` satellite frontend-API URL. That subdomain has no DNS record, so Clerk JS load fails with \`ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED\` on the production deploy. See \`docs/state/DECISIONS.md\` #004 for full context.

The hardcoded \`pk_test_*\` key is a public dev key by design — safe to commit. Production rollout will need a separate prod publishable key, also documented in #004.

## What this PR does NOT include
- The 11 \"Published your App\" auto-checkpoint commits from Replit Agent (just noise)
- \`replit.md\` drift (auto-edits, not load-bearing)
- \`artifacts/cos-pwa/dist/\` and \`artifacts/api-server/dist/\` rebuilds (deferred per DECISIONS.md #005)
- \`.claude/settings.local.json\` (personal Claude Code settings)

## Test plan
- [x] Branched off origin/main (not workspace's diverged main) so docs/ stays intact
- [x] CLAUDE.md and docs/state/ untouched
- [ ] After merge: workspace's local main hard-reset to origin/main; stash dropped (handled by Replit-Claude post-merge)
- [ ] After merge: rebuild dist/ in workspace, Republish, verify Clerk JS loads from \`promoted-elephant-87.clerk.accounts.dev\`
- [ ] Then move on to fixing the auth-302 issue (Task #30)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
pr.author: sel-squared
